description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian in a dynamic, crouched or leaping posture, with one knee bent and the other leg extended backward. The figure has a slender build, with elongated limbs and a visible head featuring stylized facial features and hair. The clothing appears to be a loose-fitting, long-sleeved top and pants, with the fabric draping and folding around the limbs. The hands and feet are visible, with the arms extended forward and the fingers splayed. The overall form is stylized and somewhat abstract, with exaggerated proportions and simplified anatomical details. The surface is smooth, with a matte finish and minimal textural detail.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian in a crouched or leaping pose, wearing loose clothing with elongated limbs and a smooth, matte surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and both arms extended forward, with the left leg bent and the right leg extended back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated right arm and leg, with the head turned slightly and the body leaning forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the draping of the clothing over the bent legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the left arm and leg, with the body posture and clothing folds visible from the side.
